activities.title: Check in to Villa dei Baronci
activities.description: Boutique agriturismo with vineyard views in Chianti

activities.title: Chianti Vineyard Wine Tasting
activities.description: Guided tasting of Sangiovese and Chianti Classico wines in the estate's organic vineyard cellars.

activities.title: Dinner at Osteria della Villa
activities.description: Enjoy Pappardelle al Cinghiale paired with estate Sangiovese, followed by Bistecca alla Fiorentina.

activities.title: Breakfast at the Villa
activities.description: Fresh Tuscan breakfast with local cheeses, cured meats, and pastries.

activities.title: Uffizi Gallery Tour
activities.description: Explore Renaissance masterpieces by Botticelli, Michelangelo, and Leonardo da Vinci. Pre-booking essential.

activities.title: Lunch in Florence — Bistecca alla Fiorentina
activities.description: Classic Florentine lunch: thick-cut T-bone steak with Chianti Classico.

activities.title: Drive to Montalcino (optional extension)
activities.description: Optional: Head south to Montalcino for an evening tasting of Brunello di Montalcino at Enoteca Poliziana.

activities.title: Farewell Dinner
activities.description: Final dinner under the Tuscan stars at your agriturismo.
